name: Pacific Northwest Inspections Group
description: Specializes in IAQ mold-related issues, water intrusion, residential and commercial inspections including mold, lead paint, asbestos, radon, VOCs, sewer scope, and blower door testing. Team of licensed and certified inspectors.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Team of Licensed and Certified Inspectors
Asbestos Accredited and Lead Paint Certified Inspectors

sentiment.summary: PNWIG presents a strong professional reputation emphasizing credentials, certifications, and comprehensive inspection services across residential and commercial properties.
